creator: markp@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Port rewritten and committed. Please use portlint to check your port 
before submitting. Also: 
- use a regex to ensure the interpreter path is correct in Perl apps 
- use INSTALL_* instead of CP 
- only install relevant documentation 
- when using NOPORTDOCS, use %%PORTDOCS%% in the plist 
- configuration files should be installed with the suffix '.sample' 
- variable values should start on the same line and only split when a line is 
too long 
- Perl modules should be installed under lib/perl5/... 

Thanks for your submission, Sitescooper is an extremely useful addition.
